expectations.text: Identifies legacy std/http serve usage as incompatible and recommends or applies Deno.serve migration.
expectations.evidence: Lines 7-33 recommend replacing std/http serve with Deno.serve.

expectations.text: Identifies deployctl as sunset and recommends new Deploy GitHub integration or deno deploy.
expectations.evidence: Lines 35-42 identify deployctl sunset and recommend GitHub integration or deno deploy.

expectations.text: Identifies Deno.Kv.enqueue or listenQueue as unsupported on new Deploy.
Does not invent a queue replacement without marking product or infrastructure choices as blockers.
expectations.evidence: Lines 54-60 list blocked choices and required inventory rather than choosing one blindly.
